name: Topic report
when_to_use: open-ended research on a topic with no decision attached — primer, literature review, state-of-the-art, 'research X for me', 'what's known about X'

name: Opportunity validation
when_to_use: validate a named product/business/market/feature opportunity and end in a go/no-go/pivot decision (F/A/D/R memo) — size a market, map competitors, assess feasibility, unit economics, or legal risk
